DP.199.0001:
A communication error has occurred.

If you were in the Union Room, you
will be returned there.
In all other cases, you will be
returned to wherever you last
saved.
Please press the A Button.
DP.199.0002:
An error occurred while attempting
to communicate. ([0136,0000])
Please turn off the power, restart
this DS system, and try again.

If this message keeps appearing,
please contact Nintendo
Consumer Service.
DP.199.0003:
A communication error has occurred.

You will be returned to the title
screen.
Please press the A Button.
DP.199.0004:
The GTS is extremely busy now.
Please wait a while and try again.

Please press the A Button.
DP.199.0005:
An error occurred while attempting
to communicate.
Please turn off the power, restart
this DS system, and try again.

If this message keeps appearing,
please contact Nintendo
Consumer Service.
